introduction: This presentation provides an overview of Elexion's equipment leasing agreements and their impact on our production capacity. We will delve into the renewal patterns and strategic implications.

subsections.heading: Overview of Elexion's Leasing Agreements
subsections.content:
• Elexion has 150 active leasing agreements as of June 2025
• The average duration of lease agreements is 36 months
• Most agreements are with manufacturers from Asia and Europe
• Leasing agreements cover a wide range of production equipment, from robotics to assembly line machinery
• The Procurement Department manages the leasing agreement process
• Elexion's lease agreements typically include a renewal option after the initial term
• The Finance team conducts periodic cost-benefit analysis to determine the feasibility of lease renewals
subsections.justification: This slide provides an overview of Elexion's leasing agreements but does not specify how many were renewed by Olivia Martinez.

subsections.heading: Implications of Lease Renewals on Production Capacity
subsections.content:
• Lease renewals ensure continuity in production operations
• Renewing leases can prevent potential downtime due to equipment unavailability
• Lease renewals can be more cost-effective than purchasing new equipment
• Regular renewal of leases allows Elexion to leverage the latest technology
• The Production Department is the primary internal stakeholder in lease renewals
• Lease renewals can influence production timelines and output forecasts
subsections.justification: This slide discusses the effect of lease renewals on production, but does not provide information on the number of renewals Olivia Martinez completed.

subsections.heading: Detailed Analysis of Olivia Martinez's Lease Renewals
subsections.content:
• Olivia Martinez has been with Elexion since 2018
• She holds a key role in the Procurement Department
• Olivia has a strong track record in negotiating favorable lease terms
• She works closely with the Finance and Production Departments in lease renewal decisions
• Olivia frequently attends industry conferences to stay updated on the latest leasing trends
• She has implemented several process improvements to streamline the lease renewal process
subsections.justification: This slide provides information about Olivia Martinez's role and achievements but does not state how many lease agreements she renewed.

conclusion: Understanding our lease renewal patterns is critical for maintaining our production capacity. We need to continue supporting Olivia's efforts in securing optimal leasing agreements.
